case_title: ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC. VS. THOMAS A GALLOT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION ANDREW FORD FILED RE: WAIVING INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLOT, THOMAS A DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-12-2009
DECLARATION OF JURISDICTIONAL FACTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC. SERVED JUL-31-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GALLOT, THOMAS A
DECLARATION DAMON BAILEY FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLOT, THOMAS A
DECLARATION ANDREW FORD FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF COURT COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLOT, THOMAS A $12,346.14 PRINCIPAL, $353.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,699.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $353.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GALLOT, THOMAS A
